name: Sun-Dried Tomatoes and Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the garlic cloves in olive oil over medium heat for 30 seconds.
2. Add the sun-dried tomatoes and chicken broth to the pan. Simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the Kalamata olives and chopped parsley.
4. Serve with crumbled goat cheese on top of pasta (such as penne or other preferred pasta).
